---
name: Feature request · 功能建议
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for a skill · 为某个 skill 提出新想法或改进
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Affected skill · 受影响的 skill
<!-- Which skill is this for? / 这个建议针对哪个 skill？ -->

- Skill name / 名称：
- Is this a new skill or an update? / 是新增 skill 还是改进现有 skill？

## Problem · 要解决的问题
<!-- What need or pain point motivates this? / 这个建议想解决什么需求或痛点？ -->


## Proposed solution · 建议方案


## Scope · 影响范围
- [ ] Adds a new skill folder · 新增一个 skill 目录
- [ ] Changes existing `SKILL.md` · 修改现有 `SKILL.md`
- [ ] Changes existing scripts / README · 修改脚本或 README
- [ ] Requires external dependencies or credentials · 需要外部依赖或凭证
- [ ] May affect related skills / Agent invocation · 可能影响相关 skill 或 Agent 调用

## Alternatives considered · 备选方案


## Additional context · 补充信息
